BABB WORKS
Electronics Assembly Center — Hamilton, ON
Investor Overview
Three Pillars & Growth
The Three Pillars
Production, Research, and Education — three integrated engines driving diversified, resilient revenue
⚡
Production
Batch manufacturing of ruggedized field controllers, industrial edge computers, and custom microcontroller boards. Runs of 50–5,000 units per order.
Year 1 Revenue $270K
Year 5 Target $2.7M
Revenue Share 73%
◈
Research
Deep firmware optimization at assembly & binary level. Power minimization, custom instruction sets, and hardware-software co-design consulting.
Year 1 Revenue $60K
Year 5 Target $400K
SR&ED Recovery Up to 43%
▣
Education
Hands-on training in electronics assembly, IPC certification, microcontroller programming from C to assembly. Mohawk & McMaster partnerships.
Year 1 Revenue $40K
Year 5 Target $300K
Cohort Size 12 → 24 seats
